Psylocke I'm sure this art set will be great for users like me who've been busy watching "SHOGUN" and "X-MEN '97" Artist Source: https://www.instagram.com/lucaspereiraart/

Daken
The Blob
"M"
Trance
Frenzy
Namor (the First Mutant)

item.title: That's What you can call an Evolution
item.dc:creator: Germinator

item.title: Sunday DUMP of assorted MEMES (specifically chosen to improve your mood)
item.description:
1. Not so scary when up a fence, ha bitch
2. Or a Yu-Gi-Oh villain kid from that island
3. This guy is either very lucky or very skillful
4. Who is watching whom
5. Nice sports car... was fun while it lasted
6. What are you choosing
7. Why
8. 5 stars, got pregnant
9. Maybe try books or having better parents?
10. Tell me
11
12
13. lol this is kinda clever
14
15 P.S. In my free time, I'm also working on my passion project. This is pretty much how my day goes... It's a "Stanley Parable" inspired game called "Do Not Press The Button" and if you like the humor of this dump, you might like the game. If you like it, please wishlists to encourage me to finish it: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Have a happy Sunday, my dudes!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: If they hate you for who you are: fuck them! I am your family now.
item.description: Doesn't matter if you need a parent or that crazy aunt/uncle or a sister. I am all of these.
item.dc:creator: ThatLeftistBlackMetalWeeb

item.title: Found: These Bottom Shelf Memes
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live!
Still unsure about joining the Bottom Shelf Community server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf Join for the games! Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tax channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the meme challenges! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: I aim to please.
item.description: I should have said, "I didn't love it, but I didn't hate it." Sounds better. I have no problem doing it for him, his happiness from it is rewarding :) Don't knock it 'til you've tried it. https://imgur.com/gallery/7NNPJGZ

item.title: It's time for another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings, online friends
sad really
that's a weird name for a hearing aid
not doing much work there..
pizza looks good. gamecube. i'm good to go
kimberly wasn't exactly on the ball there
the northern lights?
impressive
yes
mmm hmm
but what disease? man i wanna eat that coin
why can't it be 5 of the same brand?
seems legit right?
pancakes time
it was named after her
that will help with thinking of an idea
it's important
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.dc:creator: Freyja33

item.title: Has anyone else here traumatized their bed companions, too?
item.description:
Early on into our relationship - probably still within the first year or so - my fiance and I were cuddling in bed; I was passed out cold while she was busy watching YouTube videos and scrolling reddit on her phone. Apparently, I just sat upright, grabbed her by her shoulders, and, gently shaking her, insistently asked, "what do I need. What do I NEED??", my eyes still very much so closed. She, obviously shocked and confused, responded with, "I don't know, a hug??" I apparently pondered, nodded my head in agreement, said "that sounds good", hugged her, the flopped right back down on my side and went back to snoring. Apparently I just needed a hug.
Now for some cat time. Eggothy Thomas Noodlebert is quite smug about keeping me from getting up and out of bed.
"H-hey, would it be okay if you hold these? Gee, thanks!~"
Mushy nap time
item.dc:creator: goblinwithaproblem

item.title: Rainy Day Dump
item.description:
Hello
I literally hate my job
That is unfortunate
Yep
I love how stupid this is
I have the same sense of humor as a twelve year old boy
I can hear the music in this image
Puppy tax! Unfortunately not my puppies, but I did get snuggles. Have a great day :)
